title: Case Unknown
description: An interactive detective game built using a chatbot interface.
longDescription: Case Unknown is an interactive storytelling experience that challenges players to outsmart a cynical AI detective. Using a mix of memory fragments and strategic dialogue, players navigate a high-stakes interrogation designed with a time pressure element to increase tension. This project allowed me to explore the intersection of Generative AI and immersive game design, focusing on creating a cohesive, moody atmosphere.

title: Let's Move
description: An interactive data archive exploring 70 months of personal athletic history.
longDescription: Let’s Move is a deep dive into five years of personal fitness data, transforming over 2,100 days of activity into a cohesive visual narrative. The project navigates through different scales of data—from a macro-overview of a 70-month training journey to the micro-anatomy of a single run. Built with a futuristic, minimalist aesthetic, it features an interactive grid system and a synchronized biometrics dashboard. This project explores the intersection of information design and personal storytelling, highlighting how global events like the pandemic lockdowns created unique, visible peaks in individual behavioral data.
